---
title: "Viktor Anchutin"
image: photo.jpg
toc: true
format: 
  html: 
    link-external-newwindow: true
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/viktor-anchutin/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ViktorAnchutin
    - text: Resume
      href: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1uPOky437h68jm7NUkfdLGKG9XE0WzDY1/view?usp=sharing
listing: 
  type: grid
  contents:
    - "projects.qmd"
    - "blog.qmd"
---

# About

<body>
    <h2 id="typing-title"></h2>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>

<p>Passionate software engineer trained in Data Science and Robotics with years of experience. Committed to learning and growing in the field of AI</p>
<p>I started as a robotics software developer, using C and C++, and later transitioned to backend engineering with Kotlin/Java. </p>
<p>I've played a key role in building various data-intensive systems, showcasing my skills in system thinking and design. </p>
